headline: Is Invitation Homes Inc. (INVH) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Invitation Homes Inc. on Compounding Quality’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on INVH. Invitation Homes Inc.’s share was trading at $26.83 as of March 4th. INVH’s trailing and forward P/E were 27.24 and 32.26, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Invitation Homes, Inc. headline: Trump, Senate Democrats want to curb corporate homebuyers—but it may not make houses easier to buy
summary: Proposed restrictions on large corporate homebuyers could affect less than 1% of total U.S. home sales, limiting their impact on overall housing affordability.
